---
id: codespaces-service-terminate-session
title: "Terminate session"
description: "Terminates a running session (stops the VM, preserving the session for later restore)."
sidebar_label: "Terminate session"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-rde-api/api-reference/bitrise-remote-dev-environments-api

---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Terminate session"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/workspaces/{workspaceId}/sessions/{sessionId}/terminate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Terminates a running session (stops the VM, preserving the session for later restore).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
